articles.title: Fresh wave of interest pushes Cardano near all-time highs
articles.description: ADA recently came within a penny of its previous U.S. dollar all-time price high.

articles.title: Brave and BAT Join Forces With Binance Smart Chain
articles.description: Brave’s Basic Attention Token (BAT) is now part of the Binance Smart Chain (BSC) ecosystem, according to a blog post from Brave. BAT on Binance Smart Chain According to Brave, BAT is now available as a wrapped token on BSC. BAT is natively built on the Ethereum blockchain and continues to circulate on that chain. This news simply means that the original token can be exchanged for a...

articles.title: US Court allows Ripple’s co-founders to file a motion to dismiss case
articles.description: Another development occurred in the ongoing Ripple-SEC lawsuit. Ripple co-founders Brad Garlinghouse and Chris Larsen have been allowed by the court “to file a motion to dismiss the cases against them.” According to legal documents, US District Judge Analisa Torres has allowed Larsen and Garlinghouse to file their motion to dismiss by 12 April. The […]

articles.title: BeInCrypto Weekly News Round-Up: March 19, 2021
articles.description: This week several altcoins have performed exceptionally well, with a number of them hitting new all-time highs. articles.title: Chiliz Launches Manchester City NFT
articles.description: Manchester City’s global fanbase will be able to use the NFT to access exclusive rewards, promotions, games, and AR-enabled features. articles.title: Crypto Derivatives Exchange Bybit Announces ADA, DOT, and UNI Trading Pairs
articles.description: Cryptocurrency derivatives exchange Bybit has announced the addition of three new USDT trading pairs with Cardano (ADA), Polkadot (DOT) and Uniswap (UNI). According to a press release shared with CryptoGlobe, the Singapore-based exchange has introduced new trading pairs in an effort to expands its altcoin selection for clients. articles.title: Ripple appoints former Uber exec to lead Southeast Asian expansion
articles.description: Ripple's expansion plans haven't been halted by an ongoing XRP securities lawsuit, as it appoints a new managing director for the Southeast Asia region.
